views.label: OPS DECK
contentElements: origin-destination tracking hero with shipping waybill inputs
horizontal step pipeline (BOOKED/PICKED UP/IN TRANSIT/CUSTOMS/DELIVERED)
4 circular gauge clusters (throughput, on-time rate, capacity, fleet util)
4 metric chips (orders, revenue, transit time, damage rate)
dispatch log table with 5 shipment rows

views.label: MANIFESTS
contentElements: search and filter bar with selects
6-row shipping manifest table with tracking, weight, destination, status, progress

views.label: DOCK BAY
contentElements: 6-cell info grid (manifest, weight, origin, destination, status, ETA)
6 task items with checkboxes and category tags
2 note cards with author/date metadata
sidebar clipboard with stats and 4 crew members

views.label: FLOW BOARD
contentElements: 4 columns (INBOUND/STAGING/OUTBOUND/DELIVERED)
9 package cards with barcodes, weights, and type tags
SortableJS drag-and-drop enabled

views.label: ROUTE MAP
contentElements: SVG route map with 7 warehouse hub nodes
7 route lines with distance/time annotations
animated dash-offset route lines
legend (primary route, alternate route, origin, destination, relay)
4 route stats cards

views.label: INVENTORY DB
contentElements: 6 entity cards (WAREHOUSE, ZONE, BIN, SKU_ITEM, SHIPMENT, SUPPLIER)
each entity has 5-7 typed fields with PK/FK annotations

views.label: WAREHOUSE
contentElements: 3 warehouse roots (Memphis, Rotterdam, Singapore)
expandable zone > aisle > shelf > bin hierarchy
location codes (A1-S1-B1 format) and SKU/weight info at leaf nodes

views.label: IDEAS
contentElements: 6 polaroid-style idea cards
each with SVG icon, title, description, and author/date
rust orange label strip at bottom of each card

views.label: DISPATCH
contentElements: 6 radio messages with callsigns (BASE-CMD, DOCK-07, YARD-CTRL)
timestamps in HH:MM:SS format
static line separators between header and body
radio input bar with callsign prompt

views.label: CTRL PANEL
contentElements: 4 settings groups (System, Alerts, Display, Profile)
hazmat stripe badges on group headers
7 circuit breaker toggles
5 select dropdowns
2 text inputs

libraries.name: Anime.js
libraries.usage: Gauge circle animations, route line drawing, counter animations

libraries.name: SortableJS
libraries.usage: Kanban card drag-and-drop between loading zones
